label: Harvest & build operations (voxel SSOT)
notes: Tools drive LMB / radial in harvest and build modes. Yields feed the material bag for crafting.

operations.name: Gather
operations.blurb: Forage plants, herbs, fiber, and surface nodes.

operations.name: Skin
operations.blurb: Stand over a corpse · hold E to butcher (meat + leather).

operations.name: Mine
operations.blurb: Break ore and stone voxels for materials.

operations.name: Chop
operations.blurb: Fell trees and wood voxels for logs and sticks.

operations.name: Forage
operations.blurb: Search brush for food and rare mats.

operations.name: Dig
operations.blurb: Dig soil and sand voxels for fill materials.

operations.name: Fish
operations.blurb: Cast near water voxels for fish and kelp.

operations.name: Farm
operations.blurb: Tend crop voxels and harvest mature plants.

operations.name: Place
operations.blurb: Place the selected block or kit on the voxel grid.

operations.name: Wall
operations.blurb: Select wood/stone wall kit for snap place.

operations.name: Door
operations.blurb: Place door / gate kits on walls.

operations.name: Demolish
operations.blurb: Remove placed blocks · partial refund with skill.

operations.name: Paint
operations.blurb: Recolor / retype existing voxels from codex palette.
